summary_en: 364,900 shares (1.6% of S/O) up to ¥1.0B via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-18 at closing price ¥2,740/share. Purpose: capital-efficiency improvement and shareholder return under Challenge2027 mid-term plan.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and purchase of treasury shares via off-market dealing (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Carlit Co., Ltd. announced on 15 May 2026 that its board of directors approved the acquisition of treasury shares via off-market dealing (ToSTNeT-3). The company will purchase up to 364,900 ordinary shares (1.6% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate consideration not exceeding ¥1.0 billion. The purchase will occur on 18 May 2026 at 08:45 JST at the day's closing price of ¥2,740 per share. The acquisition is intended to improve capital efficiency and implement shareholder returns consistent with the company's Challenge2027 mid-term management plan (FY2025–FY2027), which emphasizes optimal capital structure. Results will be disclosed after the trading session on 18 May 2026. Purchase may be only partially executed or cancelled depending on market conditions.
